message:
✨ Wire up Shopify checkout and auto-group products by type (#4)

- Checkout button now creates a real Shopify cart and redirects to
  Shopify hosted checkout
- Collections page auto-groups products by productType (Tetras,
  Cichlids, Shrimp, etc.) when no Shopify collections exist
- Shows loading spinner during checkout creation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
